[zungu-brand-strategy (5).html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/25847377/zungu-brand-strategy.5.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>ZUNGU FESTIVAL — Brand & Strategy 2027</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Unbounded:wght@300;400;700;900&family=Space+Mono:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --black: #060808;
  --gold: #C8A84B;
  --cream: #F2EBD9;
  --rust: #C45A2A;
  --deep-green: #1A3A2A;
  --teal: #1E6B5C;
  --white: #F7F3EC;
  --muted: #6B6355;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;overflow-x:hidden;cursor:crosshair;}

/* grain */
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;
  background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.045'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;opacity:0.5;}

/* progress */
#progress{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);z-index:1001;transition:width .1s linear;width:0%;}

/* nav */
.top-nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:48px;
  background:rgba(6,8,8,0.92);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,0.12);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:0 6vw;z-index:900;}
.nav-logo{height:24px;width:auto;}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:0;}
.nav-link{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:0 18px;height:48px;display:flex;align-items:center;
  cursor:pointer;border-left:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,0.08);
  transition:color .3s,background .3s;text-decoration:none;}
.nav-link:hover,.nav-link.active{color:var(--gold);background:rgba(200,168,75,0.04);}

/* side dots */
.side-dots{position:fixed;right:20px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;z-index:500;}
.dot{width:5px;height:5px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,0.35);border-radius:50%;
  cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s;}
.dot.big{height:9px;border-radius:3px;}
.dot.active{background:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold);transform:scale(1.4);}

/* ── HERO — full-bleed aerial island ── */
.hero{
  height:100vh;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;
  padding:0 0 80px;
}
.hero-img{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-size:cover;background-position:center 60%;
  transform:scale(1.05);transition:transform 8s ease;
}
.hero-img.loaded{transform:scale(1);}
.hero-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(to top, rgba(6,8,8,0.92) 0%, rgba(6,8,8,0.4) 40%, rgba(6,8,8,0.15) 70%, rgba(6,8,8,0.3) 100%),
    linear-gradient(to right, rgba(6,8,8,0.5) 0%, transparent 60%);
}
.hero-content{position:relative;padding:0 8vw;}
.hero-eyebrow{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.6em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:20px;
  animation:fadeUp 1.2s ease .3s both;}
.hero-logo-wrap{margin-bottom:28px;animation:fadeUp 1.2s ease .4s both;}
.hero-logo-img{width:min(360px,70vw);height:auto;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(200,168,75,0.4));}
.hero-title{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(60px,12vw,160px);font-weight:900;line-height:.85;
  letter-spacing:-.03em;color:var(--white);
  animation:fadeUp 1.2s ease .5s both;}
.hero-title em{color:var(--gold);display:block;font-style:normal;}
.hero-sub{margin-top:24px;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:rgba(242,235,217,.6);
  text-transform:uppercase;animation:fadeUp 1.2s ease .6s both;}
.hero-cta{margin-top:40px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;
  border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.5);padding:12px 28px;
  font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;
  animation:fadeUp 1.2s ease .7s both;cursor:pointer;transition:background .3s;}
.hero-cta:hover{background:rgba(200,168,75,.08);}
.hero-scroll{position:absolute;bottom:32px;right:6vw;
  writing-mode:vertical-rl;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.4em;
  color:rgba(200,168,75,.5);text-transform:uppercase;}
.hero-scroll::after{content:'';display:block;width:1px;height:50px;
  background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--gold),transparent);margin:10px auto 0;}

/* ── ISLAND INTERLUDE — water-level shot ── */
.island-break{
  height:70vh;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
}
.island-break-img{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center;}
.island-break-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(6,8,8,.7) 0%, rgba(6,8,8,.2) 40%, rgba(6,8,8,.2) 60%, rgba(6,8,8,.8) 100%);
}
.island-break-text{position:relative;text-align:center;padding:0 8vw;}
.island-break-label{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.6em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px;}
.island-break-title{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(22px,4vw,52px);font-weight:700;line-height:1.1;
  color:var(--white);letter-spacing:-.02em;}
.island-break-title em{color:var(--gold);font-style:normal;}

/* ── CHAPTER DIVIDER ── */
.ch-div{padding:70px 8vw 0;border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);}
.ch-inner{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:28px;padding-bottom:0;}
.ch-num{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:90px;font-weight:900;
  color:rgba(200,168,75,.18);line-height:1;flex-shrink:0;}
.ch-block{}
.ch-eye{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.6em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;}
.ch-head{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(26px,4vw,50px);
  font-weight:700;color:var(--white);line-height:1.1;letter-spacing:-.02em;}
.ch-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:10px;line-height:1.7;max-width:560px;}

/* ── SECTION ── */
section{padding:80px 8vw;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.07);position:relative;}
.s-label{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.6em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:36px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;}
.s-label::before{content:'';width:26px;height:1px;background:var(--gold);}
.s-title{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(24px,4vw,52px);font-weight:700;
  line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-.02em;margin-bottom:32px;}
.gold{color:var(--gold);}

/* manifesto */
.mblock{max-width:880px;}
.mline{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(15px,2.2vw,28px);font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.5;color:var(--cream);margin-bottom:5px;
  opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px);transition:opacity .6s,transform .6s;}
.mline.vis{opacity:1;transform:none;}
.mline.bold{font-weight:700;color:var(--white);}
.mline.gold{color:var(--gold);}
.mline.sm{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:clamp(9px,1vw,12px);color:var(--muted);margin:14px 0;}

/* quote */
.qblock{border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding:22px 36px;
  background:rgba(200,168,75,.04);margin:32px 0;}
.qtext{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(13px,1.8vw,20px);
  font-weight:300;line-height:1.5;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:10px;}
.qattr{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;}

/* divider rule */
.rule{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin:36px 0;
  font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.5em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;}
.rule::before,.rule::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.12);}

/* contrast grid */
.cgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;}
.ccard{border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:26px 22px;background:rgba(14,24,18,.8);}
.cb-label{font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.5em;color:var(--rust);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:9px;}
.cb-bad{font-size:11px;font-style:italic;color:rgba(242,235,217,.28);
  text-decoration:line-through;text-decoration-color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:13px;line-height:1.6;}
.cdivide{height:1px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.1);margin-bottom:13px;}
.cg-label{font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.5em;color:var(--teal);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:9px;}
.cg-good{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);line-height:1.4;}

/* pillars */
.pgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;}
.pcard{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.11);
  padding:30px 24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;
  transition:background .3s,border-color .3s;}
.pcard::before{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:0;height:2px;
  background:var(--gold);transition:width .4s;}
.pcard:hover{background:rgba(200,168,75,.05);border-color:rgba(200,168,75,.35);}
.pcard:hover::before{width:100%;}
.pnum{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:13px;opacity:.7;}
.ptitle{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--white);margin-bottom:11px;line-height:1.25;}
.pbody{font-size:10px;line-height:1.8;color:rgba(242,235,217,.52);}

/* tone */
.tgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;}
.tcard{padding:26px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);}
.thead-a{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--teal);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;}
.thead-n{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--rust);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;}
.tlist span{display:block;font-size:11px;line-height:2.1;color:rgba(242,235,217,.7);}
.tlist span::before{content:'— ';color:var(--gold);}

/* timeline */
.tline{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px;}
.tlcard{background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:26px 20px;position:relative;}
.tlcard.act{background:rgba(26,58,42,.5);border-color:rgba(200,168,75,.45);}
.tlcard.act::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);}
.tlyear{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:13px;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.85;}
.tlname{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:11px;line-height:1.2;}
.tlbody{font-size:10px;line-height:1.8;color:rgba(242,235,217,.52);}

/* stages */
.slist{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;}
.srow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:70px 190px 1fr auto;
  border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);transition:border-color .3s;align-items:stretch;}
.srow:hover{border-color:var(--gold);}
.snumbox{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:900;
  color:rgba(200,168,75,.18);background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);
  border-right:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.08);transition:color .3s;min-height:78px;}
.srow:hover .snumbox{color:var(--gold);}
.srow.feat .snumbox{color:var(--gold);background:rgba(26,58,42,.5);}
.sinfo{padding:17px 20px;border-right:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.07);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;}
.sname{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:4px;}
.ssub{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;}
.sdesc{padding:17px 22px;font-size:10.5px;line-height:1.8;color:rgba(242,235,217,.58);display:flex;align-items:center;}
.sgenre{padding:17px 16px 17px 0;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--muted);text-align:right;white-space:nowrap;display:flex;align-items:center;}

/* stats */
.statrow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:0;
  border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.14);margin-top:28px;}
.statitem{padding:26px 32px 0 0;}
.statitem+.statitem{border-left:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding-left:32px;}
.statnum{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(22px,3.5vw,42px);
  font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);display:block;margin-bottom:7px;}
.statlabel{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;text-transform:uppercase;}

/* revenue */
.revgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;}
.revcard{background:rgba(14,24,18,.8);border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);
  border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding:20px 18px 20px 20px;}
.revhead{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);
  margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;}
.revpct{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);white-space:nowrap;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;}
.revbody{font-size:9px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--muted);}

/* comp table */
.ctable{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}
.ctable th{text-align:left;padding:10px 13px;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.5em;
  color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;background:rgba(26,58,42,.4);
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);}
.ctable td{padding:13px 13px;font-size:10px;color:rgba(242,235,217,.62);
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.05);}
.ctable td:first-child{color:var(--white);font-weight:700;}
.ctable tr.z td{color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;background:rgba(26,58,42,.3);
  font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.3);}

/* gov */
.ggrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;}
.gcard{background:rgba(14,24,18,.6);border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:20px 18px;}
.gtitle{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:9px;line-height:1.3;}
.gbody{font-size:9.5px;line-height:1.7;color:rgba(242,235,217,.58);}

/* partner */
.pgrid2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;}
.pcard2{border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.3);padding:30px 26px;position:relative;background:rgba(14,24,18,.6);}
.pcard2::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);}
.ptitle2{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:20px;line-height:1.2;}
.pitem{display:flex;gap:11px;margin-bottom:11px;align-items:flex-start;}
.parrow{color:var(--gold);font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;}
.ptext{font-size:11px;line-height:1.6;color:rgba(242,235,217,.68);}

/* roadmap */
.rmgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;}
.rmcard{background:rgba(14,24,18,.5);border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:26px 22px;}
.rmcard.act{background:rgba(26,58,42,.5);border-color:rgba(200,168,75,.4);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.rmcard.act::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);}
.rmyear{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:11px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.rmphase{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:5px;}
.rmsub{font-size:9px;font-style:italic;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:16px;}
.rmitem{display:flex;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px;font-size:9.5px;color:rgba(242,235,217,.62);}
.rmdash{color:var(--gold);flex-shrink:0;}

/* checklist */
.cklist{display:flex;flex-direction:column;max-width:760px;}
.ckitem{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:14px 0;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.07);cursor:pointer;
  transition:padding-left .3s;user-select:none;}
.ckitem:hover{padding-left:8px;}
.ckbox{width:17px;height:17px;border:1px solid var(--gold);flex-shrink:0;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:background .2s;}
.ckbox.done{background:var(--gold);}
.ckbox.done::after{content:'✓';font-size:10px;color:var(--black);font-weight:900;}
.cklabel{font-size:11.5px;color:rgba(242,235,217,.68);flex:1;transition:color .2s;}
.ckitem:has(.ckbox.done) .cklabel{color:var(--gold);}
.ckphase{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap;}

/* closing */
.closing{
  min-height:100vh;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;
  padding:0 0 80px;
}
.closing-img{position:absolute;inset:0;background-size:cover;background-position:center 30%;}
.closing-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(6,8,8,.97) 0%,rgba(6,8,8,.6) 50%,rgba(6,8,8,.3) 100%);
}
.closing-gold-bar{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:3px;background:var(--gold);}
.closing-content{position:relative;padding:0 8vw;}
.closing-kicker{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.6em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:32px;}
.closing-kicker::before{content:'';width:30px;height:1px;background:var(--gold);}
.closing-title{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(28px,5.5vw,66px);font-weight:700;line-height:1.08;
  color:var(--white);margin-bottom:28px;letter-spacing:-.02em;}
.closing-body{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(13px,1.7vw,19px);font-weight:300;line-height:1.65;
  color:rgba(242,235,217,.65);margin-bottom:36px;max-width:780px;}
.closing-box{border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding:22px 34px;
  background:rgba(200,168,75,.06);max-width:680px;margin-bottom:48px;}
.closing-box-text{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(12px,1.4vw,16px);font-weight:300;line-height:1.6;color:var(--white);}
.closing-foot{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px;
  padding-top:36px;border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);}
.foot-brand{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:900;
  letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--gold);}
.foot-meta{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;}

@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;}to{opacity:1;}}

@media(max-width:900px){
  .cgrid,.pgrid,.tgrid,.ggrid,.revgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .tline,.rmgrid,.pgrid2{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .srow{grid-template-columns:60px 1fr;}
  .sdesc,.sgenre{display:none;}
  .statrow{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .nav-links{display:none;}
}
@media(max-width:580px){
  .cgrid,.pgrid,.tgrid,.ggrid,.revgrid,.tline,.rmgrid,.pgrid2{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}

/* ── LOCATION ── */
.loc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;margin-top:8px;}
.loc-card{padding:28px 24px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.12);position:relative;}
.loc-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);}
.loc-num{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(32px,5vw,64px);font-weight:900;
  color:rgba(200,168,75,.12);line-height:1;margin-bottom:10px;}
.loc-title{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--white);margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.25;}
.loc-body{font-size:10.5px;line-height:1.8;color:rgba(242,235,217,.58);}
.loc-stat{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(18px,3vw,36px);
  font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px;display:block;}
.loc-stat-label{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.35em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;}

/* ── AUDIENCE ── */
.aud-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;}
.aud-card{border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.12);padding:28px 22px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.aud-card::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);}
.aud-num{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:56px;font-weight:900;
  color:rgba(200,168,75,.18);line-height:1;margin-bottom:-10px;}
.aud-seg{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;line-height:1.2;}
.aud-tag{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:14px;}
.aud-body{font-size:10px;line-height:1.8;color:rgba(242,235,217,.55);margin-bottom:16px;}
.aud-traits{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}
.aud-trait{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;}
.aud-trait::before{content:'— ';color:var(--gold);}

/* ── VISUAL DIRECTION ── */
.vis-section{}
.swatch-row{display:flex;gap:2px;margin-bottom:2px;}
.swatch{height:64px;flex:1;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;padding:8px 12px;position:relative;}
.swatch-name{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);text-transform:uppercase;}
.type-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;margin-top:2px;}
.type-card{padding:28px 24px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);}
.type-label{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.5em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:14px;}
.type-sample-h{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(24px,4vw,48px);
  font-weight:900;color:var(--white);line-height:.9;letter-spacing:-.02em;margin-bottom:10px;}
.type-sample-b{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:11px;
  line-height:1.8;color:rgba(242,235,217,.55);}
.vis-rules{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;margin-top:2px;}
.vis-rule-card{padding:24px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);}
.vis-rule-head{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.4em;margin-bottom:12px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.vis-rule-head.do{color:var(--teal);}
.vis-rule-head.dont{color:var(--rust);}
.vis-rule-list span{display:block;font-size:10.5px;line-height:2;color:rgba(242,235,217,.65);}
.vis-rule-list span::before{content:'— ';color:var(--gold);}

/* ── ASK ── */
.ask-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:2px;margin-top:8px;}
.ask-card{border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.18);padding:28px 22px;position:relative;
  background:rgba(14,24,18,.6);}
.ask-card.primary{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(26,58,42,.3);}
.ask-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:rgba(200,168,75,.2);}
.ask-card.primary::before{background:var(--gold);}
.ask-type{font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.5em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;}
.ask-title{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--white);margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1.25;}
.ask-body{font-size:10px;line-height:1.7;color:rgba(242,235,217,.55);margin-bottom:16px;}
.ask-action{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;
  border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);padding-top:14px;}

/* ── FINANCIAL MODEL ── */
.fin-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:32px;align-items:start;}
.fin-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;}
.fin-table th{text-align:left;padding:9px 14px;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.5em;
  color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;background:rgba(26,58,42,.4);
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);}
.fin-table td{padding:11px 14px;font-size:10px;color:rgba(242,235,217,.65);
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.05);}
.fin-table td:first-child{color:var(--white);}
.fin-table tr.total td{color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;
  border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.25);background:rgba(26,58,42,.2);}
.fin-note{font-size:8.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;
  border-left:2px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);padding-left:16px;margin-top:16px;}
.fin-kpis{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;}
.kpi-card{border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:18px 20px;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
.kpi-label{font-size:9.5px;color:rgba(242,235,217,.6);}
.kpi-val{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);}
.kpi-sub{font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.2em;}

/* ── SOCIAL PROOF ── */
.proof-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;}
.proof-card{border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:26px 22px;
  background:rgba(14,24,18,.5);}
.proof-festival{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--white);margin-bottom:4px;}
.proof-origin{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);
  text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:14px;}
.proof-stat{font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(20px,3vw,36px);
  font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px;display:block;}
.proof-stat-label{font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;display:block;}
.proof-body{font-size:10px;line-height:1.75;color:rgba(242,235,217,.5);}
.proof-lesson{margin-top:14px;padding-top:14px;border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);
  font-size:9px;color:var(--gold);line-height:1.6;}
.proof-lesson::before{content:'Lesson: ';color:var(--muted);}


/* ── LOCATION MAPS ── */
.map-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 2px;
  margin-top: 28px;
}
.map-panel {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #0a1218;
}
.map-panel img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
  transition: transform 6s ease;
}
.map-panel:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
.map-label {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  padding: 20px 20px 16px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(6,8,8,.9) 0%, transparent 100%);
  font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: .5em;
  color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase;
}
.map-label strong {
  display: block;
  font-family: 'Unbounded', sans-serif;
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white); letter-spacing: -.01em;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

/* Stage placement overlay on illustrated map */
.stage-map-wrap {
  position: relative;
  margin-top: 2px;
  background: #0a1218;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.stage-map-wrap img {
  width: 100%;
  display: block;
  max-height: 520px;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center;
}
.stage-map-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}
/* Stage pin labels */
.stage-pin {
  position: absolute;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.stage-pin-dot {
  width: 10px; height: 10px;
  background: var(--gold);
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid var(--black);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(200,168,75,.35), 0 0 20px rgba(200,168,75,.5);
  flex-shrink: 0;
  animation: pulse 2s ease infinite;
}
.stage-pin-dot.teal { background: #1E6B5C; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(30,107,92,.35); }
.stage-pin-dot.rust { background: var(--rust); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(196,90,42,.35); }
.stage-pin-label {
  background: rgba(6,8,8,.85);
  backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.3);
  padding: 5px 10px;
  font-family: 'Unbounded', sans-serif;
  font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--white);
  white-space: nowrap;
  line-height: 1.3;
}
.stage-pin-label span {
  display: block;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 7px; font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: .3em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
@keyframes pulse {
  0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
  50% { transform: scale(1.3); opacity: .8; }
}

/* SVG context map */
.context-map-wrap {
  margin-top: 2px;
  background: #0d1a24;
  border: 1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}
.context-map-wrap svg {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
}
.context-map-label {
  position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  padding: 14px 20px;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(6,8,8,.8) 0%, transparent 100%);
  font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: .5em; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* Full-bleed satellite section */
.satellite-full {
  position: relative;
  height: 55vh;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.satellite-full img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center;
  filter: saturate(1.1) brightness(.85);
}
.satellite-overlay {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(6,8,8,.4) 0%, transparent 30%, transparent 70%, rgba(6,8,8,.7) 100%);
}
.satellite-label {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%; left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  text-align: center;
}
.sat-title {
  font-family: 'Unbounded', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(11px, 1.5vw, 16px);
  font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: .5em;
  color: var(--white); text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.sat-sub {
  font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: .5em;
  color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase;
}

</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="progress"></div>

<nav class="top-nav">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="nav-logo" alt="Zungu">
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a class="nav-link" href="#brand">Brand</a>
    <a class="nav-link" href="#strategy">Strategy</a>
    <a class="nav-link" href="#market">Market</a>
    <a class="nav-link" href="#ops">Operations</a>
    <a class="nav-link" href="#location">Location</a><a class="nav-link" href="#partners">Partnerships</a><a class="nav-link" href="#ask">The Ask</a>
    <a class="nav-link" href="#roadmap">Roadmap</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<div class="side-dots" id="sideDots"></div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ HERO ═══════════════════════════ -->
<div class="hero" data-s="hero" id="top">
  <div class="hero-img" id="heroImg" style="background-image:url('data:image/png;base64,')"></div>
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">Brand & Strategic Deck — 2027</div>
    <div class="hero-logo-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="hero-logo-img" alt="Zungu Festival">
    </div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">ZUNGU<em>FESTIVAL</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Navy Island &nbsp;·&nbsp; Port Antonio, Jamaica &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2027 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Electronic Music Festival</p>
    <div class="hero-cta">Enter the Island ↓</div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll">Scroll</div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ CH 1: BRAND ═══════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ch-div" id="brand" data-s="brand">
  <div class="ch-inner">
    <div class="ch-num">01</div>
    <div class="ch-block">
      <div class="ch-eye">Chapter One</div>
      <div class="ch-head">The Brand</div>
      <div class="ch-sub">What Zungu is. What it is not. The mandate, the manifesto, and the positioning that travels into every institutional room.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section data-s="brand">
  <div class="s-label">01 — The Mandate</div>
  <div class="mblock">
    <p class="mline bold">Jamaica shaped the DNA of global electronic music.</p>
    <p class="mline sm">— Sound system culture. Dub engineering. Remix philosophy. Bass as architecture. —</p>
    <p class="mline">That energy traveled outward.</p>
    <p class="mline">To London. To Berlin. To Belgium. To New York.</p>
    <p class="mline">It became house. Techno. Drum & Bass. The culture as we know it.</p>
    <p class="mline" style="margin-top:12px;">But the source never positioned itself as the destination.</p>
    <p class="mline bold gold" style="font-size:clamp(20px,3vw,38px);margin-top:18px;">Zungu corrects that.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="qblock">
    <div class="qtext">"Jamaica interpreting its own influence — on its own soil — at international production standards."</div>
    <div class="qattr">Core Brand Positioning</div>
  </div>

<!-- ═══════════ ATMOSPHERE INTERLUDE ═══════════ -->
<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;margin:0 0 0;" data-s="brand">
  <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;height:50vh;">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," 
         alt="Sound system culture" 
         style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center;filter:saturate(.85) brightness(.8);transition:transform 6s ease;">
    <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(6,8,8,.8) 0%,transparent 50%);"></div>
    <div style="position:absolute;bottom:20px;left:20px;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.5em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">The Lineage</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);line-height:1.3;">Sound System<br>Culture</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;height:50vh;">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," 
         alt="Jamaica party culture" 
         style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;filter:saturate(.9) brightness(.8);transition:transform 6s ease;">
    <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(6,8,8,.8) 0%,transparent 50%);"></div>
    <div style="position:absolute;bottom:20px;left:20px;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.5em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px;">The Energy</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);line-height:1.3;">Jamaica<br>as Host</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<section data-s="brand">
  <div class="s-label">02 — What Zungu Is</div>
  <div class="s-title">Not a festival.<br><span class="gold">A position shift.</span></div>
  <div class="cgrid">
    <div class="ccard"><div class="cb-label">Not this</div><div class="cb-bad">A reggae festival with EDM acts</div><div class="cdivide"></div><div class="cg-label">But this</div><div class="cg-good">Jamaica reinterpreting its own sonic legacy at world-class scale</div></div>
    <div class="ccard"><div class="cb-label">Not this</div><div class="cb-bad">A touring circuit stop with a Caribbean backdrop</div><div class="cdivide"></div><div class="cg-label">But this</div><div class="cg-good">A permanently rooted cultural institution with commissioning power</div></div>
    <div class="ccard"><div class="cb-label">Not this</div><div class="cb-bad">A spectacle designed to trend</div><div class="cdivide"></div><div class="cg-label">But this</div><div class="cg-good">Infrastructure designed to endure — a cultural node built to last, not perform</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section data-s="brand">
  <div class="s-label">03 — Brand Pillars</div>
  <div class="s-title">What every creative<br>decision must <span class="gold">answer to</span>.</div>
  <div class="pgrid">
    <div class="pcard"><div class="pnum">01</div><div class="ptitle">Authorship,<br>Not Appropriation</div><div class="pbody">Every asset must feel made in Jamaica, not imported to it. Visual language, music, storytelling — all originate from Jamaican context and expand outward.</div></div>
    <div class="pcard"><div class="pnum">02</div><div class="ptitle">Continuity,<br>Not Nostalgia</div><div class="pbody">Zungu honours the past without performing it. Heritage is context, not costume. The visual world must feel contemporary while being undeniably rooted.</div></div>
    <div class="pcard"><div class="pnum">03</div><div class="ptitle">Discipline<br>Over Hype</div><div class="pbody">No over-promising. No spectacle for its own sake. Every claim is defensible. Every visual communicates capability, not fantasy.</div></div>
    <div class="pcard"><div class="pnum">04</div><div class="ptitle">Immersion,<br>Not Attendance</div><div class="pbody">You arrive over water. You live on-site. There is no separation between music, land, and experience. Design eliminates the line between stage and life.</div></div>
    <div class="pcard"><div class="pnum">05</div><div class="ptitle">Commission,<br>Not Curation</div><div class="pbody">Zungu creates original work — not compiled playlists. Commissioned collaborations are the product. Music made for this island, this moment.</div></div>
    <div class="pcard"><div class="pnum">06</div><div class="ptitle">Sustainability<br>As Structure</div><div class="pbody">Environmental responsibility is not branding — it is operational design. Controlled capacity, renewable energy, community participation built in from day one.</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section data-s="brand">
  <div class="s-label">04 — Tone of Voice</div>
  <div class="s-title">How Zungu <span class="gold">speaks</span>.</div>
  <div class="mblock" style="margin-bottom:28px;">
    <p class="mline bold" style="opacity:1;transform:none;">Measured. Not humble.</p>
    <p class="mline" style="opacity:1;transform:none;">Confident. Not arrogant.</p>
    <p class="mline" style="opacity:1;transform:none;">Precise. Never verbose.</p>
    <p class="mline" style="opacity:1;transform:none;">Rooted. Never nostalgic.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rule">Language Rules</div>
  <div class="tgrid">
    <div class="tcard"><div class="thead-a">Always</div><div class="tlist"><span>State, don't sell</span><span>Name the influence specifically</span><span>Speak about music with technical respect</span><span>Frame Jamaica as active, not passive</span><span>Use "we" with institutional weight</span></div></div>
    <div class="tcard"><div class="thead-n">Never</div><div class="tlist"><span>Use "vibes," "epic," "magical"</span><span>Over-reference reggae or Bob Marley</span><span>Promise what isn't confirmed operationally</span><span>Romanticize poverty or "raw" Jamaica</span><span>Compete with Tomorrowland's scale</span></div></div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ═══════════════ ISLAND INTERLUDE 1 — AERIAL ═══════════════ -->
<div class="island-break" data-s="island1">
  <div class="island-break-img" style="background-image:url('data:image/png;base64,');filter:saturate(1.1);"></div>
  <div class="island-break-overlay"></div>
  <div class="island-break-text">
    <div class="island-break-label">Navy Island, Port Antonio</div>
    <div class="island-break-title">You arrive<br>over <em>water</em>.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ CH 2: LOCATION ═══════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ch-div" id="location" data-s="location">
  <div class="ch-inner">
    <div class="ch-num">02</div>
    <div class="ch-block">
      <div class="ch-eye">Chapter Two</div>
      <div class="ch-head">The Location</div>
      <div class="ch-sub">Navy Island is not a backdrop. It is the product. The geography does work that no stage design, no production budget, and no marketing spend can replicate.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section data-s="location">
  <div class="s-label">05 — Navy Island</div>
  <div class="s-title">The geography<br>is the <span class="gold">argument</span>.</div>
  <div class="loc-grid">
    <div class="loc-card">
      <div class="loc-num">64</div>
      <div class="loc-title">Acres. Natural Borders.</div>
      <div class="loc-body">Navy Island's fixed geography enforces the scarcity that luxury events spend millions trying to manufacture. Capacity is structurally capped. Exclusivity is not a marketing decision — it is a physical fact.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="loc-card">
      <div class="loc-num">01</div>
      <div class="loc-title">Point of Entry. By Water.</div>
      <div class="loc-body">Attendees cross the water to arrive. That act of crossing — however brief — creates a psychological threshold. You leave the mainland. You enter the world of Zungu. No other festival can manufacture this transition without building it from scratch.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="loc-card">
      <div class="loc-num">★</div>
      <div class="loc-title">Port Antonio. Deliberate Obscurity.</div>
      <div class="loc-body">Port Antonio sits outside Jamaica's mass tourism corridor. No cruise ships. No all-inclusives. No competing energy. The town is known by those who seek it — which is exactly the audience Zungu is building for. Premium positioning by geography.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="loc-card">
      <div class="loc-num">↑</div>
      <div class="loc-title">Economic Activation.</div>
      <div class="loc-body">Zungu is not extracting value from Port Antonio — it is re-centring economic energy in a town that has been systematically bypassed by Jamaica's tourism economy. This is a community argument that travels in every institutional conversation.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:2px;">
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:22px 18px;text-align:center;">
      <span class="loc-stat">64</span><span class="loc-stat-label">Acres on the island</span>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:22px 18px;text-align:center;">
      <span class="loc-stat">~5min</span><span class="loc-stat-label">Boat crossing from Port Antonio</span>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:22px 18px;text-align:center;">
      <span class="loc-stat">1</span><span class="loc-stat-label">Road in or out — zero</span>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:22px 18px;text-align:center;">
      <span class="loc-stat">0</span><span class="loc-stat-label">Comparable sites in the Caribbean</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="qblock" style="margin-top:28px;">
    <div class="qtext">"Tomorrowland built a fantasy world. Zungu doesn't need to build anything. The world is already there."</div>
    <div class="qattr">Location Strategy</div>
  </div>


  <!-- SATELLITE: full-bleed proof -->
  <div class="satellite-full" style="margin: 28px -8vw 0;">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Navy Island aerial satellite view">
    <div class="satellite-overlay"></div>
    <div class="satellite-label">
      <div class="sat-title">Navy Island</div>
      <div class="sat-sub">Port Antonio, Jamaica &nbsp;·&nbsp; 64 Acres</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- STAGE MAP: illustrated with overlaid pins -->
  <div class="s-label" style="margin-top:56px;">Stage Placement</div>
  <div class="s-title" style="font-size:clamp(20px,3vw,36px);margin-bottom:12px;">Three stages.<br><span class="gold">One island.</span></div>
  <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:20px;font-style:italic;">Provisional stage placement across the island's natural terrain. Final positioning subject to site survey.</p>
  
  <div class="s-label" style="margin-top:56px;">Stage Placement & Site Map</div>
  <div class="s-title" style="font-size:clamp(20px,3vw,36px);margin-bottom:12px;">Three stages.<br><span class="gold">One island.</span></div>
  <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:20px;font-style:italic;">Provisional stage placement across the island's natural terrain. Glamping village (Dreamville equivalent) positioned on the arrival side. Subject to full site survey.</p>
  <div class="stage-map-wrap" style="background:#0a1e1a;">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Navy Island site map" 
         style="display:block;width:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:saturate(1.1) brightness(.95);">
    <div class="stage-map-overlay">

      <!-- ZUNGU MAIN — centre of island (slightly left of middle based on vector shape) -->
      <div class="stage-pin" style="top:52%;left:38%;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
          <div class="stage-pin-dot"></div>
          <div class="stage-pin-label">ZUNGU MAIN<span>Stage II · Headline</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ORIGINS — NE top-right of island -->
      <div class="stage-pin" style="top:25%;left:60%;">
        <div class="stage-pin-dot teal"></div>
        <div class="stage-pin-label">ORIGINS<span>Stage I · Heritage → Electronic</span></div>
      </div>

      <!-- REBIRTH — west/left, mid-island -->
      <div class="stage-pin" style="top:55%;left:15%;flex-direction:row-reverse;">
        <div class="stage-pin-dot rust" style="margin-left:10px;margin-right:0;"></div>
        <div class="stage-pin-label" style="text-align:right;">REBIRTH<span>Stage III · Future Sounds</span></div>
      </div>

      <!-- GLAMPING VILLAGE — east side -->
      <div class="stage-pin" style="top:38%;left:65%;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
          <div style="width:12px;height:12px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.25);border:1.5px dashed var(--gold);border-radius:2px;flex-shrink:0;animation:pulse 3s ease infinite;"></div>
          <div class="stage-pin-label" style="border-style:dashed;border-color:rgba(200,168,75,.4);background:rgba(6,8,8,.75);">
            GLAMPING VILLAGE<span>Pods · On-island accommodation</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ARRIVAL DOCK — south tip, where the dotted line meets the island -->
      <div class="stage-pin" style="top:82%;left:44%;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
          <div style="width:10px;height:10px;background:rgba(242,235,217,.45);border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--cream);flex-shrink:0;"></div>
          <div class="stage-pin-label" style="border-color:rgba(242,235,217,.2);font-size:8px;">ARRIVAL DOCK<span>~5 min from Errol Flynn Marina</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

    <!-- MAP LEGEND -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:2px;">
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
      <div style="width:10px;height:10px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(200,168,75,.5);"></div>
      <div><div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);">ZUNGU MAIN</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.2em;">Stage II</div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
      <div style="width:10px;height:10px;background:#1E6B5C;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(30,107,92,.5);"></div>
      <div><div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);">ORIGINS</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.2em;">Stage I</div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
      <div style="width:10px;height:10px;background:var(--rust);border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(196,90,42,.5);"></div>
      <div><div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);">REBIRTH</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.2em;">Stage III</div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
      <div style="width:10px;height:10px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.2);border:1.5px dashed var(--gold);border-radius:2px;flex-shrink:0;"></div>
      <div><div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);">GLAMPING</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.2em;">Village</div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
      <div style="width:10px;height:10px;background:rgba(242,235,217,.35);border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--cream);flex-shrink:0;"></div>
      <div><div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);">ARRIVAL</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.2em;">Dock</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>


  
  <div class="s-label" style="margin-top:48px;">Geographic Context</div>
  <div class="s-title" style="font-size:clamp(20px,3vw,36px);margin-bottom:12px;">Five minutes<br><span class="gold">from the mainland</span>.</div>
  <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:20px;font-style:italic;">Navy Island sits in Port Antonio's West Harbour. The Errol Flynn Marina is the departure point. The crossing is the first act of arrival.</p>
  <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#0a1218;">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Port Antonio satellite map showing Navy Island" style="width:100%;display:block;max-height:500px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 30%;filter:saturate(1.0) brightness(.9);">
    <!-- Minimal branded overlay — vector map has correct labels -->
    <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;">
      <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(6,8,8,.25) 0%,transparent 15%,transparent 85%,rgba(6,8,8,.4) 100%);"></div>
      <div style="position:absolute;top:35%;left:46%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);">
        <div style="width:10px;height:10px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;
          box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(200,168,75,.3),0 0 16px rgba(200,168,75,.6);
          animation:pulse 2s infinite;"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="position:absolute;top:43%;left:46%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
        font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);white-space:nowrap;
        background:rgba(6,8,8,.8);padding:4px 10px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.3);">
        ↑ ~5 MIN CROSSING
      </div>
    </div>
        <div class="context-map-label">Navy Island · Port Antonio West Harbour · Portland Parish, Jamaica</div>
  </div>

</section>

<section data-s="location">
  <div class="s-label">06 — Audience Definition</div>
  <div class="s-title">Three audiences.<br><span class="gold">One cultural moment.</span></div>
  <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:24px;font-style:italic;">Each distinct. Each essential. Each self-selects in.</p>
  <div class="aud-grid">
    <div class="aud-card">
      <div class="aud-num">01</div>
      <div class="aud-seg">The Global<br>Electronic Traveller</div>
      <div class="aud-tag">Primary · International</div>
      <div class="aud-body">Age 25–45. Has attended Tomorrowland, Zamna, or Dekmantel. Travels specifically for music events — not the other way around. Reads RA. Has opinions on lineups before they're announced. Spends $3,000–$8,000 per festival trip.</div>
      <div class="aud-traits">
        <span>Motivated by cultural credibility, not celebrity bookings</span>
        <span>Shares experience as identity signal</span>
        <span>Will travel for something genuinely new</span>
        <span>Values production quality and curation above all</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="aud-card">
      <div class="aud-num">02</div>
      <div class="aud-seg">The Jamaican<br>Diaspora</div>
      <div class="aud-tag">Primary · Cultural</div>
      <div class="aud-body">Jamaica-born or second-generation, living in London, New York, Toronto, Miami. Finds most "Jamaica" tourism reductive. Has been waiting for a premium cultural reason to return — or bring friends home for the first time. Zungu is that reason.</div>
      <div class="aud-traits">
        <span>Deep personal stake in Jamaica's global representation</span>
        <span>High disposable income, high cultural influence</span>
        <span>Powerful word-of-mouth across creative industries</span>
        <span>Potential ambassadors before a single ticket is sold</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="aud-card">
      <div class="aud-num">03</div>
      <div class="aud-seg">The Music<br>Professional</div>
      <div class="aud-tag">Secondary · Industry</div>
      <div class="aud-body">Producers, DJs, label A&Rs, booking agents, music journalists. Attends festivals as research, networking, and participation. If Zungu commissions original work, these people want to be in the room where the music is being made — or at minimum, present when it premieres.</div>
      <div class="aud-traits">
        <span>Multiplier effect — one music professional = 1,000 ears</span>
        <span>Press and institutional credibility builders</span>
        <span>Future collaborators, not just audience</span>
        <span>Small in number, enormous in influence</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ ISLAND INTERLUDE 1 — AERIAL ═══════════════ -->
<div class="island-break" data-s="island1">
  <div class="island-break-img" style="background-image:url('data:image/png;base64,');filter:saturate(1.1);"></div>
  <div class="island-break-overlay"></div>
  <div class="island-break-text">
    <div class="island-break-label">Navy Island, Port Antonio</div>
    <div class="island-break-title">You arrive<br>over <em>water</em>.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ CH 2: STRATEGY ═══════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ch-div" id="strategy" data-s="strategy">
  <div class="ch-inner">
    <div class="ch-num">02</div>
    <div class="ch-block">
      <div class="ch-eye">Chapter Two</div>
      <div class="ch-head">The Strategy</div>
      <div class="ch-sub">The cultural lineage that makes Zungu defensible. The experience architecture. The competitive position.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<section data-s="brand">
  <div class="s-label">04B — Visual Direction</div>
  <div class="s-title">What Zungu<br><span class="gold">looks like</span>.</div>
  <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:28px;font-style:italic;">Every visual decision must feel made in Jamaica, not imported to it.</p>

  <div class="rule">Colour Palette</div>
  <div class="swatch-row">
    <div class="swatch" style="background:#080808;flex:2;"><span class="swatch-name">Island Black — #080808</span></div>
    <div class="swatch" style="background:#C8A84B;flex:1.5;"><span class="swatch-name" style="color:rgba(0,0,0,.7);">Gold — #C8A84B</span></div>
    <div class="swatch" style="background:#1A3A2A;flex:1.2;"><span class="swatch-name">Forest — #1A3A2A</span></div>
    <div class="swatch" style="background:#C45A2A;flex:1;"><span class="swatch-name">Rust — #C45A2A</span></div>
    <div class="swatch" style="background:#F2EBD9;flex:1;"><span class="swatch-name" style="color:rgba(0,0,0,.6);">Cream — #F2EBD9</span></div>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.3em;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 24px;">No neons. No pastels. No tropical clichés.</p>

  <div class="rule">Typography</div>
  <div class="type-row">
    <div class="type-card">
      <div class="type-label">Display — Unbounded 900</div>
      <div class="type-sample-h">ZUNGU<br>2027</div>
      <p style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:12px;line-height:1.7;">Used for all headlines, chapter numbers, and brand statements. Heavy. Architectural. Zero decorative quality — weight earns its place.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="type-card">
      <div class="type-label">Body — Space Mono 400</div>
      <div class="type-sample-b">Cultural authorship is<br>documented. Not mythology.<br>Traceable music history.<br><br>Every word is deliberate.<br>No filler. No padding.</div>
      <p style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:12px;line-height:1.7;">Monospace signals precision, not decoration. Used for body copy, labels, data. Pairs tension against the display weight above.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="rule" style="margin-top:24px;">Photography Rules</div>
  <div class="vis-rules">
    <div class="vis-rule-card">
      <div class="vis-rule-head do">Shoot This</div>
      <div class="vis-rule-list">
        <span>Real people, real equipment, real music being made</span>
        <span>Deep shadows — high contrast, unstyled</span>
        <span>Water, jungle, island geography as context</span>
        <span>Equipment close-ups: cables, speakers, boards</span>
        <span>Faces in low light — expression over spectacle</span>
        <span>Empty spaces before and after the event</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="vis-rule-card">
      <div class="vis-rule-head dont">Never Shoot This</div>
      <div class="vis-rule-list">
        <span>Crowds with hands in the air at sunset</span>
        <span>Generic "island paradise" composition</span>
        <span>Aerial drone clichés over beaches</span>
        <span>Heavily filtered or colour-graded "mood" shots</span>
        <span>Artists posed in costume or festival wristbands</span>
        <span>Anything that could be from any tropical festival</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section data-s="strategy">
  <div class="s-label">05 — The Lineage</div>
  <div class="s-title">Cultural Authorship<br>Is <span class="gold">Documented</span>.</div>
  <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:26px;font-style:italic;">Not mythology. Traceable music history.</p>
  <div class="tline">
    <div class="tlcard"><div class="tlyear">1950s – 60s</div><div class="tlname">Sound System Culture</div><div class="tlbody">Kingston's mobile speaker stacks and MC toasting pioneered DJ-led performance — the structural template for all club and festival culture globally.</div></div>
    <div class="tlcard"><div class="tlyear">1970s</div><div class="tlname">Dub Engineering</div><div class="tlbody">King Tubby and Lee Scratch Perry treated the studio as instrument — a conceptual precursor to remix culture and electronic production as art.</div></div>
    <div class="tlcard"><div class="tlyear">1980s – 90s</div><div class="tlname">Diaspora & Bass Music</div><div class="tlbody">Jamaican sound system culture seeded UK rave scenes, directly birthing jungle, drum & bass, dubstep — core pillars of the electronic music canon.</div></div>
    <div class="tlcard act"><div class="tlyear">2027</div><div class="tlname">Zungu Festival</div><div class="tlbody">Jamaica steps into the global electronic conversation — not as historical footnote, but as curator and host. The continuation, not the revival.</div></div>
  </div>

  <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;height:35vh;margin-top:28px;">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," 
         alt="Sound system — the origin of it all"
         style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 30%;filter:saturate(.8) brightness(.65);">
    <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to right,rgba(6,8,8,.85) 0%,transparent 50%,rgba(6,8,8,.3) 100%);"></div>
    <div style="position:absolute;top:50%;left:5%;transform:translateY(-50%);">
      <div style="font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.5em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;">The Hardware</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(14px,2.5vw,28px);font-weight:700;color:var(--white);line-height:1.1;max-width:400px;">
        The speaker stack<br>predates the festival<br>by 70 years.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>

<section data-s="strategy">
  <div class="s-label">06 — Experience Architecture</div>
  <div class="s-title">Three stages.<br><span class="gold">One narrative arc.</span></div>
  <p style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-style:italic;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:22px;font-weight:300;">Origin → Present → Future</p>
  <div class="slist">
    <div class="srow"><div class="snumbox">I</div><div class="sinfo"><div class="sname">ORIGINS</div><div class="ssub">Heritage → Electronic</div></div><div class="sdesc">Ska, rocksteady, dub, roots — reinterpreted through Afro-house, UK garage, and bass-driven contemporary frameworks. The past, made present.</div><div class="sgenre">Afro-House · UK Garage · Roots Electronic</div></div>
    <div class="srow feat"><div class="snumbox">II</div><div class="sinfo"><div class="sname">ZUNGU MAIN</div><div class="ssub">Global × Jamaican Collaboration</div></div><div class="sdesc">High-production headline programming. Commissioned collaborations between Jamaican and international electronic producers. Nothing replayed — everything made for this.</div><div class="sgenre">Melodic Techno · Progressive House · Bass</div></div>
    <div class="srow"><div class="snumbox">III</div><div class="sinfo"><div class="sname">REBIRTH</div><div class="ssub">Future Sounds</div></div><div class="sdesc">Experimental bass. Forward-facing sounds shaped by Jamaican rhythmic logic. Music made for this island, this moment. Where the lineage goes next.</div><div class="sgenre">Experimental Bass · Future Electronic · Hybrid</div></div>

  <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;height:55vh;margin-top:2px;">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Island stage at night" 
         style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 40%;filter:brightness(.8);">
    <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to right,rgba(6,8,8,.75) 0%,transparent 55%,rgba(6,8,8,.3) 100%);"></div>
    <div style="position:absolute;top:50%;left:5%;transform:translateY(-50%);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.5em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;">The Venue</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(16px,3vw,36px);font-weight:700;color:var(--white);line-height:1.1;max-width:480px;">
        Jungle behind.<br>Ocean in front.<br>No other stage<br><em style="color:var(--gold);font-style:normal;">exists like this.</em>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>

<!-- ═══════════════ ISLAND INTERLUDE 2 — WATER LEVEL ═══════════════ -->
<div class="island-break" data-s="island2" style="height:80vh;">
  <div class="island-break-img" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');background-position:center 40%;"></div>
  <div class="island-break-overlay" style="background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(6,8,8,.65) 0%,rgba(6,8,8,.1) 40%,rgba(6,8,8,.1) 60%,rgba(6,8,8,.85) 100%);"></div>
  <div class="island-break-text">
    <div class="island-break-label">64 acres · Controlled access · Island immersion</div>
    <div class="island-break-title">There is no separation<br>between stage<br>and <em>life</em>.</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ CH 3: MARKET ═══════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ch-div" id="market" data-s="market">
  <div class="ch-inner">
    <div class="ch-num">03</div>
    <div class="ch-block">
      <div class="ch-eye">Chapter Three</div>
      <div class="ch-head">The Market</div>
      <div class="ch-sub">The gap Zungu fills. The competitive context. The revenue model that sustains it.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section data-s="market">
  <div class="s-label">07 — The Gap</div>
  <div class="s-title">Jamaica shaped the DNA<br>of electronic music culture.</div>
  <p style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(14px,2vw,22px);font-weight:300;font-style:italic;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:6px;">But never positioned itself as the destination.</p>
  <div class="statrow">
    <div class="statitem"><span class="statnum">ZERO</span><span class="statlabel">Globally positioned<br>electronic flagship<br>events in Jamaica</span></div>
    <div class="statitem"><span class="statnum">$7.4B</span><span class="statlabel">Global electronic<br>music market<br>(2024 estimate)</span></div>
    <div class="statitem"><span class="statnum">NOW</span><span class="statlabel">The timing window<br>for Jamaica to enter<br>as curator and host</span></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section data-s="market">
  <div class="s-label">08 — Competitive Landscape</div>
  <div class="s-title">Comparable Tier.<br><span class="gold">Distinct Territory.</span></div>
  <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:22px;font-style:italic;">A growing Caribbean and global boutique electronic field validates the market — and confirms Zungu's position as the only event with genuine cultural authorship at its foundation.</p>
  <table class="ctable">
    <thead><tr><th>Festival</th><th>Location</th><th>Positioning</th><th>Zungu Advantage</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td>Tomorrowland</td><td>Belgium</td><td>Global Fantasy Scale</td><td>Cultural Depth / Caribbean Activation</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Zamna</td><td>Tulum, Mexico</td><td>Boutique Destination</td><td>Authorship Narrative / Island Immersion</td></tr>
      <tr><td>SXM Festival</td><td>St. Martin</td><td>Caribbean Boutique</td><td>Jamaican Lineage / Commissioned Music IP</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Electric Forest</td><td>Michigan, USA</td><td>Immersive Nature</td><td>Cultural Origin Story / Global Positioning</td></tr>
      <tr><td>BPM Festival</td><td>Costa Rica</td><td>Underground Techno Destination</td><td>Caribbean Basin Presence / Cultural Authorship</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Fifth Element Festival</td><td>Puerto Rico</td><td>Afro-Caribbean Electronic</td><td>Nearest Peer — Jamaican Lineage Runs Deeper</td></tr>
      <tr class="z"><td>ZUNGU</td><td>Jamaica</td><td>Cultural Re-Centering</td><td>— SOURCE —</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
  <div class="qblock" style="margin-top:26px;">
    <div class="qtext">"Zungu is not competing with Tomorrowland. It occupies a different terrain. Both can coexist — and potentially strengthen one another."</div>
    <div class="qattr">Strategic Positioning Framework</div>
  </div>
</section>

<section data-s="market">
  <div class="s-label">09 — Revenue Model</div>
  <div class="s-title">Multiple Streams.<br><span class="gold">One Disciplined Model.</span></div>
  <div class="revgrid">
    <div class="revcard"><div class="revhead">Tiered Ticketing <span class="revpct">45%</span></div><div class="revbody">GA · Premium · Villa access. Year 1 capped at 3,500–5,000. Scarcity drives premium pricing without over-selling.</div></div>
    <div class="revcard"><div class="revhead">On-Island Accommodation <span class="revpct">22%</span></div><div class="revbody">Immersive on-site packages. Reduces off-island economic leakage from Port Antonio.</div></div>
    <div class="revcard"><div class="revhead">Sponsorship & Partners <span class="revpct">18%</span></div><div class="revbody">Cultural and brand partners aligned with sustainability and music innovation. No logo soup.</div></div>
    <div class="revcard"><div class="revhead">Commissioned Music IP <span class="revpct">10%</span></div><div class="revbody">Original collaboration releases. Streaming, licensing, merchandise. Builds long-term catalog value beyond event days.</div></div>
    <div class="revcard"><div class="revhead">Merchandise & Digital <span class="revpct">5%</span></div><div class="revbody">Limited-edition physical merchandise. Festival-exclusive digital releases. Brand equity compounding year on year.</div></div>
    <div class="revcard" style="border-left-color:rgba(200,168,75,.22);background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);">
      <div class="revhead" style="color:var(--gold);font-size:10px;">Financial Discipline</div>
      <div class="revbody" style="color:rgba(200,168,75,.5);">Min. 70% ticket revenue secured before event week. CapEx / OpEx / Artist budgets modeled separately.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ CH 4: OPS ═══════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ch-div" id="ops" data-s="ops">
  <div class="ch-inner">
    <div class="ch-num">04</div>
    <div class="ch-block">
      <div class="ch-eye">Chapter Four</div>
      <div class="ch-head">Operations & Risk</div>
      <div class="ch-sub">The safeguards that separate Zungu from every festival that collapsed on hype. Discipline as competitive advantage.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section data-s="ops">
  <div class="s-label">10 — Risk & Governance</div>
  <div class="s-title">Discipline<br><span class="gold">Over Hype.</span></div>
  <div class="qblock" style="margin-bottom:28px;max-width:660px;">
    <div class="qtext">"A world-class festival has never collapsed because it was well-engineered. Zungu is engineered first."</div>
  </div>
  <div class="ggrid">
    <div class="gcard"><div class="gtitle">Phased Capacity Lock</div><div class="gbody">Year 1 hard cap: 3,500–5,000. No scaling based on hype. Expansion only after post-event audit confirms infrastructure and experience quality.</div></div>
    <div class="gcard"><div class="gtitle">Infrastructure Audit First</div><div class="gbody">Marine transport, power redundancy, emergency protocols, and waste management locked before any public announcement or ticket sale.</div></div>
    <div class="gcard"><div class="gtitle">Production Partner Required</div><div class="gbody">Proven international or Jamaican production partner (10+ yrs scale). No DIY execution. Contracts before commitments.</div></div>
    <div class="gcard"><div class="gtitle">Financial Safeguards</div><div class="gbody">CapEx / OpEx / Artist costs modeled separately. Minimum 70% projected revenue secured before event week.</div></div>
    <div class="gcard"><div class="gtitle">Booking Discipline</div><div class="gbody">40% artist deposits only after insurance secured. No speculative bookings for optics or PR.</div></div>
    <div class="gcard"><div class="gtitle">Governance Board</div><div class="gbody">Advisory board: music industry + finance + environment. Local government liaison. Independent auditor post Year 1.</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section data-s="ops">
  <div class="s-label">11 — Pre-Launch Checklist</div>
  <div class="s-title">Before one ticket<br>is <span class="gold">announced</span>.</div>
  <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:28px;letter-spacing:.05em;">Click to mark complete.</p>
  <div class="cklist" id="checklist">
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Marine transport feasibility study completed for Navy Island access</span><span class="ckphase">Infrastructure</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Power redundancy system and electrical capacity audit signed off</span><span class="ckphase">Infrastructure</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Weather contingency and emergency evacuation protocol developed</span><span class="ckphase">Infrastructure</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Waste management and sustainability partner contracted</span><span class="ckphase">Sustainability</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Experienced production partner engaged (10+ yrs festival scale)</span><span class="ckphase">Operations</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Year 1 capacity hard cap set at 3,500–5,000 — no exceptions</span><span class="ckphase">Operations</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">CapEx / OpEx / Marketing / Artist budget lines modeled separately</span><span class="ckphase">Finance</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Minimum 70% projected ticket revenue secured before event week</span><span class="ckphase">Finance</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Artist contracts include 40% deposits only after insurance secured</span><span class="ckphase">Talent</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Commissioned collaboration contracts with Jamaican + international producers</span><span class="ckphase">Talent</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Advisory board assembled (music industry + finance + environment)</span><span class="ckphase">Governance</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Local government liaison and community participation framework in place</span><span class="ckphase">Governance</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Brand identity system finalized and locked</span><span class="ckphase">Brand</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Press rollout framework and media story arc approved</span><span class="ckphase">Brand</span></div>
    <div class="ckitem" onclick="toggle(this)"><div class="ckbox"></div><span class="cklabel">Embassy and institutional partner outreach initiated</span><span class="ckphase">Partnerships</span></div>
  </div>
  <div id="ckstatus" style="margin-top:20px;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;"></div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ CH 5: PARTNERS ═══════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ch-div" id="partners" data-s="partners">
  <div class="ch-inner">
    <div class="ch-num">05</div>
    <div class="ch-block">
      <div class="ch-eye">Chapter Five</div>
      <div class="ch-head">Partnerships</div>
      <div class="ch-sub">Strategic dialogue with embassies, cultural institutions, and global festival brands. Not a sponsorship ask.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section data-s="partners">
  <div class="s-label">12 — Partnership Opportunity</div>
  <div class="s-title">Strategic Dialogue.<br><span class="gold">Not a Sponsorship Ask.</span></div>
  <div class="pgrid2">
    <div class="pcard2">
      <div class="ptitle2">For Embassies &amp;<br>Cultural Bodies</div>
      <div class="pitem"><span class="parrow">→</span><span class="ptext">Artist exchange programs between territories</span></div>
      <div class="pitem"><span class="parrow">→</span><span class="ptext">Co-commissioned electronic reinterpretations</span></div>
      <div class="pitem"><span class="parrow">→</span><span class="ptext">Production methodology knowledge transfer</span></div>
      <div class="pitem"><span class="parrow">→</span><span class="ptext">Sustainability framework dialogue</span></div>
      <div class="pitem"><span class="parrow">→</span><span class="ptext">Cultural diplomacy through music innovation</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="pcard2">
      <div class="ptitle2">For Global<br>Festival Partners</div>
      <div class="pitem"><span class="parrow">→</span><span class="ptext">Caribbean presence without building from scratch</span></div>
      <div class="pitem"><span class="parrow">→</span><span class="ptext">Cultural depth — origin narrative adds portfolio credibility</span></div>
      <div class="pitem"><span class="parrow">→</span><span class="ptext">Commissioning model — shared IP creation, not just booking exchange</span></div>
      <div class="pitem"><span class="parrow">→</span><span class="ptext">Sustainability laboratory at island scale</span></div>
      <div class="pitem"><span class="parrow">→</span><span class="ptext">Long-term creative economy bridge between territories</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ CH 6: ROADMAP ═══════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ch-div" id="roadmap" data-s="roadmap">
  <div class="ch-inner">
    <div class="ch-num">06</div>
    <div class="ch-block">
      <div class="ch-eye">Chapter Six</div>
      <div class="ch-head">The Roadmap</div>
      <div class="ch-sub">Three phases. Mythology earned through delivery, not declared through marketing.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section data-s="roadmap">
  <div class="s-label">13 — Three-Phase Roadmap</div>
  <div class="s-title">Boutique → Flagship → <span class="gold">Global Node.</span></div>
  <p style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-style:italic;color:var(--gold);font-weight:300;margin-bottom:28px;">Earned mythology through delivery. Not declared through marketing.</p>
  <div class="rmgrid">
    <div class="rmcard act">
      <div class="rmyear">Year 1 – 2</div><div class="rmphase">Boutique</div><div class="rmsub">Prove the Model</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Capacity: 3,500–5,000</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Commission 6–8 original tracks</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Establish logistics infrastructure</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Build institutional partnerships</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Document everything</div>
    </div>
    <div class="rmcard">
      <div class="rmyear">Year 3 – 5</div><div class="rmphase">Flagship</div><div class="rmsub">Caribbean Authority</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Expand format &amp; capacity</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Caribbean flagship status</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Growing IP catalog</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> EU cultural partnerships active</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Port Antonio permanently associated</div>
    </div>
    <div class="rmcard">
      <div class="rmyear">Year 5+</div><div class="rmphase">Global Node</div><div class="rmsub">Recognized Circuit Position</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Jamaica = curator, not footnote</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Zungu cited as cultural institution</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Commissioning economy established</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Generational creative infrastructure</div>
      <div class="rmitem"><span class="rmdash">—</span> Recognized global electronic node</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ═══════════════════════════ CH 9: PROOF ═══════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ch-div" id="proof" data-s="proof">
  <div class="ch-inner">
    <div class="ch-num">09</div>
    <div class="ch-block">
      <div class="ch-eye">Chapter Nine</div>
      <div class="ch-head">Comparable Precedents</div>
      <div class="ch-sub">How boutique culturally-rooted festivals became global institutions. The pattern is documented. Zungu follows it deliberately.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section data-s="proof">
  <div class="s-label">16 — Social Proof & Precedents</div>
  <div class="s-title">The model<br>has <span class="gold">worked before</span>.</div>
  <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:24px;font-style:italic;">Three festivals that started small, stayed disciplined, and became cultural institutions.</p>
  <div class="proof-grid">
    <div class="proof-card">
      <div class="proof-festival">Zamna</div>
      <div class="proof-origin">Tulum, Mexico · Est. 2017</div>
      <span class="proof-stat">800 → 30K+</span>
      <span class="proof-stat-label">Attendees in 5 years</span>
      <div class="proof-body">Started as a single-night event in a jungle cenote for 800 people. No marketing budget. No mainstream bookings. Pure word-of-mouth within the global electronic community. Within 4 years, Zamna had become one of the most influential boutique events in the world — Tulum permanently associated with its name.</div>
      <div class="proof-lesson">Geography + cultural specificity + discipline beats scale every time.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="proof-card">
      <div class="proof-festival">Dekmantel</div>
      <div class="proof-origin">Amsterdam, Netherlands · Est. 2013</div>
      <span class="proof-stat">3,000 → 35K</span>
      <span class="proof-stat-label">Capacity growth over 10 years</span>
      <div class="proof-body">Built on curatorial credibility rather than mainstream headliners. The founding team were record collectors and DJs first — and they made programming decisions accordingly. Dekmantel is now considered the gold standard of credible electronic festival programming globally. Amsterdam is inseparable from its identity.</div>
