      <div class="proof-lesson">Curatorial authorship is a long-term brand asset that compounds.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="proof-card">
      <div class="proof-festival">Afropunk</div>
      <div class="proof-origin">Brooklyn, USA · Est. 2005</div>
      <span class="proof-stat">200 → 60K</span>
      <span class="proof-stat-label">Attendees across global editions</span>
      <div class="proof-body">Began as a film screening for 200 people in Brooklyn. Grew by naming a cultural identity that had no platform — and giving it one. Now operates in Brooklyn, Paris, Johannesburg, and London. The model: identify an underserved cultural audience, build the space they deserve, and let the community do the rest.</div>
      <div class="proof-lesson">Cultural authorship creates communities that recruit themselves.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="qblock" style="margin-top:28px;">
    <div class="qtext">"The pattern across every credible boutique-to-institution trajectory is the same: start small, stay disciplined, let the music do the work. Zungu is designed around this pattern — not around the exception."</div>
    <div class="qattr">Strategic Positioning Framework</div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ═══════════════════════════ CH 8: FINANCIALS ═══════════════════════════ -->

<!-- ═══════════════════ STAGE 0 PREREQUISITES ═══════════════════ -->
<div class="ch-div" id="prereqs" data-s="prereqs">
  <div class="ch-inner">
    <div class="ch-num">00</div>
    <div class="ch-block">
      <div class="ch-eye">Before Chapter One</div>
      <div class="ch-head">Stage 0 Prerequisites</div>
      <div class="ch-sub">Three conditions that must be satisfied before any capital is committed. These are not checklist items — they are existential gates.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section data-s="prereqs">
  <div class="s-label">00 — Stage 0 Prerequisites</div>
  <div class="s-title">The gates that must<br><span class="gold">open first.</span></div>
  <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:28px;max-width:680px;">The Zungu proposal is architecturally sound. The cultural thesis is defensible. The financial model is stress-tested. None of that matters until three foundational conditions are confirmed. These are ordered by dependency — each one unlocks the next.</p>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-bottom:28px;">

    <!-- Gate 1 -->
    <div style="border:2px solid rgba(196,90,42,.5);padding:28px 24px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.04);position:relative;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:-1px;left:24px;background:var(--rust);color:var(--white);font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;padding:4px 10px;">GATE 01 — CRITICAL</div>
      <div style="margin-top:14px;">
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:12px;line-height:1.3;">NAVY ISLAND<br>ACCESS RIGHTS</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;">Confirmed written agreement — minimum 5-year exclusive lease or licence — with Navy Island's current owner(s). This is the single most existential question in the entire proposal. Without confirmed access, no planning expenditure is justified and no capital should be committed.</div>
        <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding-top:14px;">
          <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">CURRENT STATUS</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(242,235,217,.5);line-height:1.6;">Not yet commenced. Identifying the current ownership structure of Navy Island and initiating access discussions is the first active step of the project. All other milestones depend on it.</div>
        </div>
        <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding-top:14px;margin-top:14px;">
          <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">WHAT THIS UNLOCKS</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">Confirmed access enables: JTB regulatory pathway, marine transport study, insurance scoping, glamping planning, and all CapEx modelling.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gate 2 -->
    <div style="border:2px solid rgba(196,90,42,.5);padding:28px 24px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.04);position:relative;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:-1px;left:24px;background:var(--rust);color:var(--white);font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;padding:4px 10px;">GATE 02 — CRITICAL</div>
      <div style="margin-top:14px;">
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:12px;line-height:1.3;">MARINE TRANSPORT<br>FEASIBILITY STUDY</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;">Independent feasibility study addressing: vessel capacity at peak crossing (post-headliner departures), weather and sea-state contingency for Portland Parish's rainfall profile, emergency evacuation protocol from the island at night, and queue management for 1,800+ attendees at the dock.</div>
        <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding-top:14px;">
          <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">CURRENT STATUS</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(242,235,217,.5);line-height:1.6;">Listed as a pre-launch checklist item. Not yet completed. This study defines the logistical ceiling of the event and is a prerequisite for any safety approval from JTB or Portland Parish authorities.</div>
        </div>
        <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding-top:14px;margin-top:14px;">
          <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">WHAT THIS UNLOCKS</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">Defines actual capacity ceiling, emergency protocol, ferry operating cost, and insurance requirements. Without it, attendance figures in the P&L are unconstrained assumptions.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gate 3 -->
    <div style="border:2px solid rgba(200,168,75,.35);padding:28px 24px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);position:relative;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:-1px;left:24px;background:var(--gold);color:var(--black);font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;padding:4px 10px;">GATE 03 — HIGH PRIORITY</div>
      <div style="margin-top:14px;">
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:12px;line-height:1.3;">JTB FORMAL<br>ENGAGEMENT</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;">Formal letter of interest or heads of terms from the Jamaica Tourist Board confirming: regulatory pathway for a commercial event on Navy Island, safety co-ordination framework (police, port authority, medical), and assessment of grant or co-investment eligibility.</div>
        <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);padding-top:14px;">
          <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;">CURRENT STATUS</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(242,235,217,.5);line-height:1.6;">Not yet commenced. JTB engagement is a long-lead item. Every month it is delayed adds to the critical path. Tourism is ~9% of Jamaica's GDP — JTB is politically sensitive to events that risk negative international press.</div>
        </div>
        <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);padding-top:14px;margin-top:14px;">
          <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;">WHAT THIS UNLOCKS</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">Regulatory confidence for investors. Co-marketing eligibility. Local vendor and hotel partnership credibility. Potential reduction in operational insurance costs.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- DEPENDENCY CHAIN -->
  <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);padding:22px 26px;background:rgba(6,8,8,.5);">
    <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:14px;">CRITICAL PATH — DEPENDENCY ORDER</div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:0;align-items:center;">
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:12px 8px;border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.4);background:rgba(196,90,42,.06);">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--rust);">GATE 01</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-top:4px;line-height:1.3;">Island Access<br>Confirmed</div>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center;font-size:16px;color:rgba(200,168,75,.4);">→</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:12px 8px;border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.4);background:rgba(196,90,42,.06);">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--rust);">GATE 02</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-top:4px;line-height:1.3;">Marine Study<br>Complete</div>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center;font-size:16px;color:rgba(200,168,75,.4);">→</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:12px 8px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.3);background:rgba(200,168,75,.05);">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--gold);">GATE 03</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-top:4px;line-height:1.3;">JTB Letter<br>of Interest</div>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center;font-size:16px;color:rgba(200,168,75,.4);">→</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:12px 8px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);background:rgba(200,168,75,.06);">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--gold);">UNLOCKED</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);margin-top:4px;line-height:1.3;">Capital<br>Commitment</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


<!-- ═══════════════════════ STAGE 0: PREREQUISITES ═══════════════════════ -->
<section data-s="ops" style="background:rgba(30,8,8,.6);border-top:2px solid rgba(196,90,42,.4);">
  <div class="s-label" style="color:var(--rust);">STAGE 0 — Non-Negotiable Prerequisites</div>
  <div class="s-title" style="font-size:clamp(22px,3vw,38px);">Before capital.<br><span style="color:var(--rust);">Before tickets. Before anything.</span></div>
  <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:28px;max-width:700px;">Three foundational items must be resolved before any investment commitment is made, any marketing is activated, or any production planning begins. These are not risks to be managed — they are prerequisites to be unlocked. In sequence.</p>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-bottom:24px;">

    <div style="border:2px solid rgba(196,90,42,.6);padding:28px 24px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.06);position:relative;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:-1px;left:24px;background:var(--rust);color:#fff;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;padding:4px 10px;">PREREQUISITE 01 — EXISTENTIAL</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin:18px 0 14px;line-height:1.3;">Navy Island<br>Access Rights</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;">Current status: <span style="color:var(--rust);font-weight:700;">NOT YET COMMENCED.</span> Navy Island's current ownership, lease history, and access rights require independent legal verification. A confirmed written agreement — minimum 5-year exclusive lease or licence — must be secured before any further planning expenditure. This is the single question on which the entire venture depends.</div>
      <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding-top:12px;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:6px;">REQUIRED ACTION</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);line-height:1.7;">→ Instruct independent property lawyer in Jamaica<br>→ Confirm ownership through Land Titles registry<br>→ Open lease negotiations with owner(s)<br>→ Target: executed agreement before Q3 2026</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="border:2px solid rgba(196,90,42,.5);padding:28px 24px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.04);position:relative;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:-1px;left:24px;background:var(--rust);color:#fff;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;padding:4px 10px;">PREREQUISITE 02 — CRITICAL</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin:18px 0 14px;line-height:1.3;">Marine Transport<br>Feasibility Study</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;">Current status: <span style="color:var(--rust);font-weight:700;">NOT YET COMPLETED.</span> Moving 1,800–3,500 attendees across water is a maritime safety operation, not a logistics question. This study must address vessel capacity, crossing frequency, weather and sea-state contingency (Portland Parish receives the highest rainfall in Jamaica), emergency evacuation protocol, and night-time crossing safety.</div>
      <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding-top:12px;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:6px;">REQUIRED ACTION</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);line-height:1.7;">→ Commission independent maritime logistics consultant<br>→ Survey Errol Flynn Marina vessel capacity and berth availability<br>→ Model weather risk using Portland 10-year rainfall data<br>→ Establish emergency evacuation protocol with coast guard<br>→ Target: completed study before investor presentations</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div style="border:2px solid rgba(196,90,42,.4);padding:28px 24px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.03);position:relative;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:-1px;left:24px;background:var(--rust);color:#fff;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;padding:4px 10px;">PREREQUISITE 03 — HIGH PRIORITY</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin:18px 0 14px;line-height:1.3;">Jamaica Tourist<br>Board Engagement</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;">Current status: <span style="color:rgba(200,168,75,.8);font-weight:700;">NOT YET COMMENCED.</span> Regulatory approval is the longest-lead item in the entire development timeline. NEPA (National Environment &amp; Planning Agency), Portland Parish local government, and the Jamaica Environment Trust all have jurisdictional interests. JTB engagement unlocks the regulatory pathway — and must begin before the financial model can be finalised.</div>
      <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding-top:12px;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:6px;">REQUIRED ACTION</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);line-height:1.7;">→ Formal introduction meeting with JTB Events &amp; Tourism desk<br>→ Present cultural and economic impact brief<br>→ Identify grant eligibility and co-investment pathways<br>→ Establish regulatory coordination framework with NEPA<br>→ Target: letter of interest or heads of terms by Q2 2026</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="border-left:3px solid var(--rust);padding:16px 22px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.06);">
    <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">NOTE TO INVESTORS &amp; PARTNERS</div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--cream);line-height:1.7;max-width:820px;">The financial model, investment ask, and production timeline in this document are contingent on the resolution of these three prerequisites. No capital commitment should be made — and none is being solicited — until items 01 and 02 are confirmed. This is not a weakness in the proposal. It is the correct sequencing of a responsibly developed project.</div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="ch-div" id="financials" data-s="financials">
  <div class="ch-inner">
    <div class="ch-num">08</div>
    <div class="ch-block">
      <div class="ch-eye">Chapter Eight</div>
      <div class="ch-head">Year 1 Financial Model</div>
      <div class="ch-sub">Conservative assumptions. Separated cost lines. A model built to be stress-tested — not to impress.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section data-s="financials">
  <div class="s-label">15 — Revenue Architecture + Year 1 P&L</div>
  <div class="s-title">How the best<br><span class="gold">destination festivals</span> actually make money.</div>
  <p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:28px;font-style:italic;">Benchmarked against Tomorrowland, SXM Festival, and Zamna. Every serious destination festival sells three things simultaneously: Festival Pass · Accommodation · Curated Experiences. Sell only tickets and you leave millions behind.</p>

  <!-- BENCHMARK ROW -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-bottom:2px;">
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);padding:20px 22px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;">TOMORROWLAND</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);">$2,000–3,000</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:6px;line-height:1.6;">Average all-in per attendee. Festival pass €320–460. DreamVille glamping $450–$2,000+. Global Journey flight packages $700–2,500. DreamVille is the primary profit centre — not the ticket.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);padding:20px 22px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;">SXM FESTIVAL — CLOSEST ISLAND MODEL</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);">$1,200–3,000</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:6px;line-height:1.6;">5-day pass ~$375. Hotel + festival packages $948–$1,448 pp. Villa parties, boat events, sunrise sets drive real revenue. Island model proves the format — Zungu has a superior natural setting.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);padding:20px 22px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;">ZAMNA TULUM</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);">$800–2,000</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:6px;line-height:1.6;">Series of jungle events. GA $100–250/night. VIP/backstage $2,000–4,000. Revenue from bottle service, brand partnerships, multi-event passes. Proof that underground credibility scales.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 4-TIER ARCHITECTURE -->
  <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);padding:18px 0 12px;border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);margin-top:2px;">ZUNGU REVENUE ARCHITECTURE — 4 TIERS</div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px;margin-bottom:2px;">
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.12);padding:20px 18px;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:10px;">TIER 01</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:14px;">FESTIVAL PASS</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:12px;">Early Access · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$250</span><br>General Admission · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$350</span><br>VIP · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$650</span></div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding-top:10px;">3-day island access. Day-trip attendees via scheduled ferry from Errol Flynn Marina.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.3);padding:20px 18px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.04);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:10px;">TIER 02 — PRIMARY PROFIT</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:14px;">GLAMPING<br><span style="color:var(--gold);">ON ISLAND</span></div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:12px;">Safari Tent (shared) · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$1,500 pp</span><br>Private Glamping · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$2,400 pp</span><br>Luxury Cabana · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$3,200 pp</span></div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding-top:10px;">Includes pass, breakfast, concierge. 250 guests × ~$2,200 avg. Note: Year 1 is a temporary island deployment. DreamVille comparison is structural, not scale — DreamVille represents 15+ years of iteration on owned land.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.12);padding:20px 18px;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:10px;">TIER 03</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:14px;">PORT ANTONIO<br>HOTEL PACKAGES</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:12px;">Boutique + Pass · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$1,200 pp</span><br>Luxury Resort + Pass · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$2,500 pp</span><br>Private Villa · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$5,000+</span></div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding-top:10px;">Target partners: Geejam, Trident, Jamaica Palace. Hotel agreements subject to commercial negotiation. Revenue modelled at confirmed-partnership rate only.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding:20px 18px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.04);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:10px;">TIER 04 — ASPIRATIONAL</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:14px;">ZUNGU CIRCLE<br><span style="color:var(--rust);">HIGH NET WORTH</span></div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:12px;">Private boat transfer · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$150</span><br>Secret beach set · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$200</span><br>Artist dinner · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$350</span><br>VIP villa afterparty · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$500</span><br>Full Circle Package · <span style="color:var(--cream);">$3,500–6,000</span></div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding-top:10px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.8);">Excluded from base-case break-even calculation. Modelled as upside. Activation subject to confirmed pre-registrations prior to marketing launch.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- THREE-SCENARIO P&L -->
  <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);padding:18px 0 12px;border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);">YEAR 1 — THREE-SCENARIO STRESS TEST</div>
  <p style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:14px;font-style:italic;">Contingency raised to 15% reflecting island event risk profile (weather, marine access, generator). Sponsorship revenue reclassified as contingent pending LOI. HNW tier excluded from base-case break-even. Three scenarios modelled: Base Case (full occupancy, no overrun), Downside (70% occupancy), Stress (70% occupancy + 30% cost overrun).</p>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:2px;margin-bottom:2px;">

    <!-- Header row -->
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.06);border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);">REVENUE LINE</div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.06);border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);">BASE CASE</div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;">100% occ.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.06);border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.2);text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);">DOWNSIDE</div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;">70% occ.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(180,30,30,.06);border:1px solid rgba(180,30,30,.25);text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:#c45a5a;">STRESS</div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;">70% occ. + 30% cost</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Revenue rows -->
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Festival Passes (1,000 / 700 / 700 × avg $550)</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$550,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$385,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$385,000</div>

    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Glamping Village (250 / 175 / 175 × avg $2,200)</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$550,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$385,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$385,000</div>

    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Hotel Packages (450 / 315 / 315 × avg $1,400)</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$630,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$441,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$441,000</div>

    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Zungu Circle HNW <span style="color:rgba(196,90,42,.7);font-size:8px;">(excluded from break-even calc)</span></div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.7);">+$450,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.5);">—</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.5);">—</div>

    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Sponsorship <span style="color:rgba(196,90,42,.7);font-size:8px;">(contingent on LOI — excluded base case)</span></div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.7);">+$300,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.5);">—</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.5);">—</div>

    <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.05);border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);">CONFIRMED REVENUE</div>
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.05);border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);text-align:right;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);">$1,730,000</div>
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.05);border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.2);text-align:right;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;color:var(--rust);">$1,211,000</div>
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(180,30,30,.05);border:1px solid rgba(180,30,30,.2);text-align:right;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;color:#c45a5a;">$1,211,000</div>

    <!-- Cost rows -->
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;">Artist Fees</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$620,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$620,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$806,000</div>

    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Production — 3 Stages</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$700,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$700,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$910,000</div>

    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Island Infrastructure + Ferry</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$350,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$350,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$455,000</div>

    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Operations, Staff + Security</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$210,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$210,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$273,000</div>

    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Marketing + Press</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$160,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$160,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$208,000</div>

    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Insurance + Legal</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$95,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$95,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$123,500</div>

    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Navy Island Lease / Access <span style="color:rgba(196,90,42,.7);font-size:8px;">(TBD — subject to negotiation)</span></div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.7);">TBD</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.7);">TBD</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.7);">TBD</div>

    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Post-Event / Island Restoration <span style="color:rgba(196,90,42,.7);font-size:8px;">(env. compliance, demobilisation)</span></div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.7);">est. $40,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.7);">est. $40,000</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:rgba(196,90,42,.7);">est. $52,000</div>

    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);">Contingency 15% <span style="color:rgba(200,168,75,.5);font-size:8px;">(raised from 10% — island event risk premium)</span></div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$266,250</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$266,250</div>
    <div style="padding:9px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--cream);">$346,125</div>

    <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.05);border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);">TOTAL COSTS</div>
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.05);border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);text-align:right;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);">$2,441,250</div>
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.05);border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.2);text-align:right;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;color:var(--rust);">$2,441,250</div>
    <div style="padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(180,30,30,.05);border:1px solid rgba(180,30,30,.2);text-align:right;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:900;color:#c45a5a;">$3,173,625</div>

    <!-- Net result rows -->
    <div style="padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-top:2px;">NET (CONFIRMED REVENUE ONLY)</div>
    <div style="padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);text-align:right;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);">–$711,250</div>
    <div style="padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.2);text-align:right;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:900;color:var(--rust);">–$1,230,250</div>
    <div style="padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(180,30,30,.2);text-align:right;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:900;color:#c45a5a;">–$1,962,625</div>

    <div style="padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);">Net incl. HNW + Sponsorship (if activated)</div>
    <div style="padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--gold);">+$38,750</div>
    <div style="padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.15);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:var(--rust);">–$480,250</div>
    <div style="padding:12px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(180,30,30,.15);text-align:right;font-size:9px;color:#c45a5a;">–$1,212,625</div>
  </div>

  <!-- WHAT THIS MEANS box -->
  <div style="border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding:18px 24px;margin:2px 0;background:rgba(200,168,75,.04);">
    <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;">WHAT THIS TELLS US</div>
    <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;">The base case confirms the model is viable only with both HNW and sponsorship revenue activated. This is intentional: Year 1 is a proving edition. The investment ask is structured to bridge confirmed revenue to confirmed costs, with HNW and sponsorship representing earned upside, not assumed income. The downside scenario defines the maximum capital exposure. The stress scenario defines the funding floor under which the event should not proceed.</div>
  </div>

  <!-- WORKING CAPITAL BRIDGE -->
  <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);padding:18px 0 12px;border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);">WORKING CAPITAL BRIDGE — WHY INVESTMENT IS REQUIRED</div>
  <p style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:14px;">Ticket revenue is held in escrow and releases only at confirmed milestones. But pre-event commitments must be paid before escrow releases. This is the structural funding gap that the investment ask addresses directly.</p>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px;margin-bottom:2px;">
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding:18px 16px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.04);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">PRE-REVENUE OBLIGATION 01</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:6px;">$248,000</div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;">Artist deposits — 40% of $620K due at contract signing, before a single ticket is sold.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding:18px 16px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.04);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">PRE-REVENUE OBLIGATION 02</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:6px;">$175,000</div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;">Infrastructure deposits — staging, power, ferry contracts. Vendors require 25% upfront to reserve capacity.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding:18px 16px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.04);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">PRE-REVENUE OBLIGATION 03</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:6px;">$95,000</div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;">Insurance and legal — event cancellation, public liability, marine liability. Must be scoped and bound before ticket sales open.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.3);padding:18px 16px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.06);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;">MINIMUM SEED CAPITAL REQUIRED</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:6px;">$518,000</div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;">Before ticket escrow activates. This defines the floor of the investment ask. Full ask of $800K–$2M funds seed capital plus operating runway to the 70% pre-sale threshold.</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- KPIs row -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:2px;">
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:14px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--muted);">BREAK-EVEN</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin:6px 0;">82%</div>
      <div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--muted);">occupancy (no HNW/spon.)</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:14px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--muted);">SEED FLOOR</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin:6px 0;">$518K</div>
      <div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--muted);">pre-revenue minimum</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:14px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--muted);">CONTINGENCY</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin:6px 0;">15%</div>
      <div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--muted);">island event standard</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:14px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--muted);">SAFETY TRIGGER</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin:6px 0;">70%</div>
      <div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--muted);">pre-sale before full commit</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:14px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--muted);">YR 3 TARGET</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin:6px 0;">$6–8M</div>
      <div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--muted);">at 3,500 capacity</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:14px;text-align:center;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--muted);">10-YR VISION</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin:6px 0;">$20M+</div>
      <div style="font-size:7px;color:var(--muted);">platform + IP ecosystem</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="fin-note" style="margin-top:12px;">All figures are indicative and subject to full feasibility study and independent financial review by a qualified accountant with event industry experience. Navy Island lease costs, marine transport feasibility study outcomes, and final insurance quotes are not yet modelled and will materially affect the final P&L. These scenarios are stress-testing tools, not a prospectus.</div>
</section>




<!-- ═══════════════════════════ STAKEHOLDER STRATEGY ═══════════════════════════ -->
<section data-s="ask" style="padding-top:0;">
  <div class="s-label">09B — Stakeholder Strategy</div>
  <div class="s-title">Two conversations.<br><span class="gold">Different languages.</span></div>
  <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:28px;max-width:680px;">The Belgian Embassy validates cultural credibility. The Jamaica Tourist Board provides operational power. One gives prestige — the other gives execution support. Zungu needs both, and they respond to entirely different arguments.</p>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;margin-bottom:2px;">
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.25);padding:28px 26px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:12px;">PRIORITY 01 — OPERATIONAL POWER</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:16px;line-height:1.2;">JAMAICA<br>TOURIST BOARD</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;">JTB controls the national tourism narrative. Their approval signals government legitimacy, global media amplification, and co-marketing through official channels. Tourism is ~9% of Jamaica's GDP. Zungu aligns perfectly with their mandate: increase economic impact, diversify tourism flows, attract high-spend international visitors.</div>
      <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);padding-top:14px;margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:10px;">WHAT ZUNGU DELIVERS FOR JTB</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;">→ Extends visitor season beyond peak months<br>→ Redirects high-spend internationals to Portland — an underdeveloped region<br>→ $1,500–3,000 average spend per attendee with strong local multiplier<br>→ Every post tagged #ZunguFestival markets Jamaica globally<br>→ Positions Jamaica against Tulum, Sint Maarten, Playa del Carmen<br>→ Cultural export aligned with JTB brand values</div>
      </div>
      <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);padding-top:14px;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:10px;">WHAT ZUNGU ASKS FROM JTB</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;">→ Permitting and regulatory guidance<br>→ Safety coordination: police, maritime, medical<br>→ Connections to local service providers<br>→ Marketing co-funding and tourism grants<br>→ Artist visa facilitation</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.1);padding:28px 26px;">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:12px;">PRIORITY 02 — CULTURAL CREDIBILITY</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:16px;line-height:1.2;">BELGIAN<br>EMBASSY</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;">The embassy connection is the pathway to Tomorrowland. Their language is cultural: heritage, international exchange, creative diplomacy. The argument is not that Zungu wants Tomorrowland's blessing — it's that a collaboration makes strategic sense for both parties.</div>
      <div style="border-top:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);padding-top:14px;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:10px;">WHY TOMORROWLAND SHOULD CARE</div>
        <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;">→ Tomorrowland is already a global cultural platform actively expanding its footprint<br>→ The Caribbean is the last major untapped EDM destination — they know this<br>→ Jamaica's dub and sound system culture influenced the entire electronic canon<br>→ Navy Island is a rare private island venue — closer to DreamVille than anything else in the region<br>→ Seasonal fit: Caribbean calendar doesn't conflict with Belgium or France<br>→ Potential structures: production consulting, joint artist programming, content for Tomorrowland media</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- FYRE PREVENTION -->
  <div style="border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding:28px 26px;margin-top:2px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.03);">
    <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.4em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:12px;">OPERATIONAL CREDIBILITY — THE FYRE PREVENTION SYSTEM</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.4;">Every institutional conversation ends with the same unspoken question.</div>
    <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:20px;">"How do we know this won't be Fyre Festival?"</div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;">
      <div style="border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.2);padding:16px 18px;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">RULE 01</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;">Infrastructure Before Marketing</div>
        <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">Ticket sales cannot open until accommodation inventory, stage production contracts, transport logistics, and emergency services are signed. Marketing never outpaces infrastructure.</div>
      </div>
      <div style="border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.2);padding:16px 18px;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">RULE 02</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;">1 Ticket = 1 Verified Bed</div>
        <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">Capacity locked to verified accommodation across glamping and hotel inventory. Zungu cannot sell more tickets than beds exist. The single rule that eliminates the core Fyre failure.</div>
      </div>
      <div style="border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.2);padding:16px 18px;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">RULE 03</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;">Staged Escrow Revenue</div>
        <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">Ticket revenue held in escrow. Releases only at verified milestones: infrastructure contracts signed → production deposits paid → artist confirmations finalized. Money cannot be spent irresponsibly.</div>
      </div>
      <div style="border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.2);padding:16px 18px;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">RULE 04</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;">Verified Operations Team</div>
        <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">Core ops must include individuals with verified credits at Ultra, Tomorrowland, or Coachella. Festivals don't fail from lack of vision — they fail from operational inexperience.</div>
      </div>
      <div style="border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.2);padding:16px 18px;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">RULE 05</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;">Government Integration Early</div>
        <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">Tourism authorities, port authority, police, and medical services engaged before tickets go on sale. Regulatory shutdown risk eliminated at the beginning — not managed at the end.</div>
      </div>
      <div style="border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.2);padding:16px 18px;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:8px;">RULE 06</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;">Independent Safety Audit</div>
        <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;">External event safety consultant reviews evacuation routes, ferry capacity, crowd density, and emergency response before every edition. Non-negotiable. All major festivals run these routinely.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ CH 7: THE ASK ═══════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ch-div" id="ask" data-s="ask">
  <div class="ch-inner">
    <div class="ch-num">07</div>
    <div class="ch-block">
      <div class="ch-eye">Chapter Seven</div>
      <div class="ch-head">The Ask</div>
      <div class="ch-sub">What Zungu needs. From whom. What we are offering in return. Specific, honest, and time-bound.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section data-s="ask">
  <div class="s-label">14 — What We Need</div>
  <div class="s-title">Not a cheque.<br><span class="gold">A conversation.</span></div>
  <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:28px;font-style:italic;">We are in active development. These are the three conversations we need to have in 2025–2026 to confirm Year 1 (2027).</p>
  <div class="ask-grid">
    <div class="ask-card primary">
      <div class="ask-type">Priority 01</div>
      <div class="ask-title">Strategic Partner /<br>Lead Investor</div>
      <div class="ask-body">We are seeking one or two strategic partners who understand the cultural and commercial opportunity — not just the festival, but the IP, the commissioning model, and the long-term brand asset being built.<br><br>We are not selling sponsorship slots. We are offering a position in the founding architecture of something built to last.</div>
      <div class="ask-action" style="padding:0;">
        <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:10px;">WORKING CAPITAL BRIDGE — PRE-REVENUE CASH REQUIREMENT</div>
        <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:9px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);">
            <td style="padding:6px 0;color:var(--muted);">Artist deposits (40% of $620K fees)</td>
            <td style="padding:6px 0;text-align:right;color:var(--cream);">$248,000</td>
          </tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);">
            <td style="padding:6px 0;color:var(--muted);">Infrastructure prepayments (staging, power, ferry contracts)</td>
            <td style="padding:6px 0;text-align:right;color:var(--cream);">$280,000</td>
          </tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);">
            <td style="padding:6px 0;color:var(--muted);">Pre-launch marketing + press (6 months pre-event)</td>
            <td style="padding:6px 0;text-align:right;color:var(--cream);">$120,000</td>
          </tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);">
            <td style="padding:6px 0;color:var(--muted);">Insurance, legal + compliance (upfront)</td>
            <td style="padding:6px 0;text-align:right;color:var(--cream);">$95,000</td>
          </tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);">
            <td style="padding:6px 0;color:var(--muted);">Development costs (feasibility studies, access negotiation)</td>
            <td style="padding:6px 0;text-align:right;color:var(--cream);">$80,000</td>
          </tr>
          <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);">
            <td style="padding:6px 0;color:var(--muted);">Contingency reserve on pre-revenue spend</td>
            <td style="padding:6px 0;text-align:right;color:var(--cream);">$177,000</td>
          </tr>
          <tr style="background:rgba(200,168,75,.06);">
            <td style="padding:8px 0;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);">TOTAL PRE-REVENUE REQUIREMENT</td>
            <td style="padding:8px 0;text-align:right;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);">$1,000,000</td>
          </tr>
        </table>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;">
          <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.2);padding:10px 12px;">
            <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px;">FLOOR — MINIMUM VIABLE</div>
            <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);">$1,000,000</div>
            <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px;">Covers pre-revenue commitments. Dependent on strong ticket presales to bridge operational costs.</div>
          </div>
          <div style="border:1px solid rgba(196,90,42,.3);padding:10px 12px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.04);">
            <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:4px;">CEILING — DOWNSIDE COVERAGE</div>
            <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:900;color:var(--white);">$2,000,000</div>
            <div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px;">Covers pre-revenue + full operational gap at 70% occupancy or 30% cost overrun scenario.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ask-card">
      <div class="ask-type">Priority 02</div>
      <div class="ask-title">Cultural Institution /<br>Embassy Partnership</div>
      <div class="ask-body">We are seeking 2–3 cultural bodies — embassies, arts councils, music export offices — willing to co-commission original works and provide artist exchange programming.<br><br>This is not a sponsorship. This is a shared authorship arrangement. Your institution's name on music that will outlive the festival.</div>
      <div class="ask-action" style="font-size:9px;line-height:1.6;">
        <span style="display:block;margin-bottom:6px;">Timeline: MOU by Q3 2026</span>
        <span style="display:block;color:rgba(200,168,75,.6);font-style:italic;">Note: IP commissioning model — ownership structure, licensing terms, royalty splits, and investor participation rights — will be legally structured as a prerequisite to this partnership. Commissioned works: ownership TBD pending legal framework.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ask-card">
      <div class="ask-type">Priority 03</div>
      <div class="ask-title">Production Partner /<br>Operational Co-Lead</div>
      <div class="ask-body">We need an experienced production partner with island or remote-venue experience. Not a vendor — a co-architect of the operational model who has solved these problems before and can stress-test our assumptions.<br><br>In exchange: first right of refusal on Years 2–5 as the event scales.</div>
      <div class="ask-action">RFP: Q1 2026</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="qblock" style="margin-top:28px;">
    <div class="qtext">"We are not pitching a dream. We are presenting a model. The next step is a conversation, not a commitment."</div>
    <div class="qattr">Zungu Festival — Development Team</div>
  </div>
  <div style="margin-top:32px;padding:24px;border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.5em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;">Next Step</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);">Request a 30-minute briefing call.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.3em;text-transform:uppercase;line-height:2;">
      Port Antonio, Jamaica<br>
      Navy Island · 2027
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ CLOSING ═══════════════════════════ -->
<div class="closing" data-s="closing">
  <div class="closing-img" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');"></div>
  <div class="closing-overlay"></div>
  <div class="closing-gold-bar"></div>
  <div class="closing-content">
    <div class="closing-kicker">The Brief, Distilled</div>
    <div class="closing-title">Zungu Festival is Jamaica<br>stepping into the global<br>electronic conversation —</div>
    <div class="closing-body">a high-production, sustainability-conscious gathering on Navy Island that reinterprets the island's musical legacy through contemporary global dance culture.</div>
    <div class="closing-box">
      <div class="closing-box-text">Zungu positions Jamaica as a <strong>curator</strong> — not just a contributor — within the global electronic music economy.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="closing-foot">
      <div class="foot-brand">ZUNGU FESTIVAL</div>
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="height:28px;width:auto;opacity:.85;" alt="Zungu">
      <div class="foot-meta">Port Antonio, Jamaica &nbsp;·&nbsp; Navy Island &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2027</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// Side dots
const allSections = document.querySelectorAll('[data-s]');
const dotsEl = document.getElementById('sideDots');
allSections.forEach((el,i) => {
  const d = document.createElement('div');
  const s = el.dataset.s;
  const isBig = ['hero','brand','strategy','market','ops','partners','roadmap','closing'].includes(s);
  d.className = 'dot' + (isBig ? ' big' : '') + (i===0 ? ' active' : '');
  d.title = s; d.onclick = () => el.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});
  dotsEl.appendChild(d);
});
const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.dot');
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if(e.isIntersecting){
      const idx = [...allSections].indexOf(e.target);
      dots.forEach((d,i) => d.classList.toggle('active', i===idx));
      const s = e.target.dataset.s;
      document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(l =>
        l.classList.toggle('active', l.getAttribute('href') === '#'+s));
    }
  });
},{threshold:0.35});
allSections.forEach(s => obs.observe(s));

// Progress
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  const d = document.documentElement;
  document.getElementById('progress').style.width =
    (d.scrollTop/(d.scrollHeight-d.clientHeight)*100)+'%';
});

// Manifesto reveal
const mlines = document.querySelectorAll('.mline');
const mobs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if(e.isIntersecting){
      const idx = [...mlines].indexOf(e.target);
      setTimeout(() => e.target.classList.add('vis'), idx * 90);
    }
  });
},{threshold:0.1});
mlines.forEach(l => { if(l.style.opacity!=='1') mobs.observe(l); });

// Hero parallax
const heroImg = document.getElementById('heroImg');
setTimeout(() => heroImg.classList.add('loaded'), 100);
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  const y = window.scrollY;
  if(y < window.innerHeight * 1.5)
    heroImg.style.transform = `scale(1) translateY(${y*0.3}px)`;
});

// Checklist
function toggle(item){
  item.querySelector('.ckbox').classList.toggle('done');
  const total = document.querySelectorAll('.ckitem').length;
  const done = document.querySelectorAll('.ckbox.done').length;
  const el = document.getElementById('ckstatus');
  if(!done){el.textContent='';}
  else if(done===total){el.textContent=`✓ All ${total} complete — ready to announce.`;el.style.color='var(--gold)';}
  else{el.textContent=`${done} of ${total} complete`;el.style.color='var(--muted)';}
}

// Arrow keys
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  const active = [...dots].findIndex(d => d.classList.contains('active'));
  if((e.key==='ArrowDown'||e.key==='ArrowRight') && active<allSections.length-1)
    allSections[active+1].scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});
  if((e.key==='ArrowUp'||e.key==='ArrowLeft') && active>0)
    allSections[active-1].scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'});
});
</script>
</body>
</html
  <!-- SCENARIO ANALYSIS already present above as THREE-SCENARIO STRESS TEST -->
  <div style="display:none;"><!-- duplicate removed --></div>
  <p style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:16px;font-style:italic;">Independent forensic review identified absence of downside scenarios as a critical gap. The following stress tests model two adverse cases alongside the base case.</p>
  <div style="overflow-x:auto;margin-bottom:2px;">
  <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:10px;">
    <thead>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.3);">
        <th style="text-align:left;padding:10px 14px;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:7px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.2em;width:28%;">ASSUMPTION</th>
        <th style="text-align:center;padding:10px 14px;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:7px;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:.2em;background:rgba(200,168,75,.05);">BASE CASE<br><span style="color:var(--muted);font-weight:400;">100% Occupancy</span></th>
        <th style="text-align:center;padding:10px 14px;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:7px;color:rgba(200,168,75,.6);letter-spacing:.2em;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);">DOWNSIDE A<br><span style="color:var(--muted);font-weight:400;">70% Occupancy</span></th>
        <th style="text-align:center;padding:10px 14px;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:7px;color:var(--rust);letter-spacing:.2em;background:rgba(196,90,42,.04);">DOWNSIDE B<br><span style="color:var(--muted);font-weight:400;">+30% Cost Overrun</span></th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);">
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;color:var(--muted);">Festival Passes sold</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);color:var(--cream);">1,000</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.02);color:rgba(242,235,217,.7);">700</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(196,90,42,.03);color:rgba(242,235,217,.7);">1,000</td>
      </tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);">
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;color:var(--muted);">Glamping occupancy</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);color:var(--cream);">250</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.02);color:rgba(242,235,217,.7);">175</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(196,90,42,.03);color:rgba(242,235,217,.7);">250</td>
      </tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);">
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;color:var(--muted);">Hotel packages sold</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);color:var(--cream);">450</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.02);color:rgba(242,235,217,.7);">315</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(196,90,42,.03);color:rgba(242,235,217,.7);">450</td>
      </tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);">
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;color:var(--muted);">Contingent rev. (HNW + Sponsorship)</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);color:rgba(200,168,75,.7);font-size:9px;">Excluded</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.02);color:rgba(200,168,75,.7);font-size:9px;">Excluded</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(196,90,42,.03);color:rgba(200,168,75,.7);font-size:9px;">Excluded</td>
      </tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);">
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;color:var(--muted);">Cost overrun multiplier</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);color:var(--cream);">×1.0</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.02);color:rgba(242,235,217,.7);">×1.0</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(196,90,42,.03);color:var(--rust);">×1.3</td>
      </tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);">
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;color:var(--muted);font-style:italic;">Confirmed Revenue</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.05);color:var(--cream);">$1,730,000</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);color:rgba(242,235,217,.7);">$1,211,000</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(196,90,42,.04);color:rgba(242,235,217,.7);">$1,730,000</td>
      </tr>
      <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);">
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;color:var(--muted);font-style:italic;">Total Costs (excl. lease)</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.05);color:var(--cream);">$2,515,250</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);color:rgba(242,235,217,.7);">$2,515,250</td>
        <td style="padding:9px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(196,90,42,.04);color:var(--rust);">$3,269,825</td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td style="padding:12px 14px;font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);">NET POSITION</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(200,168,75,.08);font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:900;color:rgba(200,168,75,.7);">–$785K</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(196,90,42,.06);font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:900;color:var(--rust);">–$1.30M</td>
        <td style="padding:12px 14px;text-align:center;background:rgba(196,90,42,.1);font-family:'Unbounded',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:900;color:var(--rust);">–$1.54M</td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-bottom:2px;">
    <div style="border-left:3px solid rgba(200,168,75,.4);padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.04);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:6px;">BASE CASE READING</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;">The confirmed revenue base does not cover costs without contingent revenue (HNW + sponsorship). The investment ask exists precisely to bridge this gap. If contingent revenue converts, net position approaches breakeven.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border-left:3px solid rgba(196,90,42,.4);padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.04);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:6px;">DOWNSIDE A READING</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;">At 70% occupancy — a realistic Year 1 scenario for an unproven event — the funding gap reaches $1.3M. This is the primary argument for securing a strategic partner with patient capital, not transactional event investment.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="border-left:3px solid rgba(196,90,42,.6);padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(196,90,42,.06);">
      <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:6px;">DOWNSIDE B READING</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;">A 30% cost overrun on a greenfield island event is within historical range for comparable first editions. The $1.54M gap at this scenario defines the upper bound of the investment ask and justifies the $2M ceiling.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="border:1px solid rgba(200,168,75,.15);padding:14px 18px;background:rgba(200,168,75,.03);margin-bottom:2px;">
    <div style="font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:6px;">WHY WE SHOW THIS</div>
    <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--cream);line-height:1.7;">These scenarios are not a concession — they are a demonstration of financial discipline. Every credible destination festival (Tomorrowland, SXM) modelled losses in Year 1. The goal of Year 1 is proof of execution and brand establishment, not profit. Investors who understand this category know that the return is in Years 3–7, not Year 1.</div>
  </div>

>
